name: Hoe Till
description: a gritty dig of a hoe breaking soil
usage: Tilling a soil tile with the hoe.

ai.prompt: A hoe breaking soil: a gritty, earthy dig with clods of dirt crumbling and a short scrape, natural farm foley. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
